title: trifolium montanum
intro: Trifolium montanum, also known as Alpine Clover or Mountain Clover, is a species of flowering plant in the legume family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antispasmodic effects. The plant is rich in flavonoids, saponins, and phenolic acids, which have been found to have various health benefits, including reducing oxidative stress, improving cardiovascular health, and exhibiting antimicrobial activity. Alpine Clover can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, making it a popular choice among herbalists for its potential health benefits.
